title: Shipping Accessible Navigation
content: Accessible navigation starts with keyboard support. Every menu action must be reachable without a mouse and provide visible focus feedback.
Use semantic labels and keep interaction states clear. Small improvements like descriptive aria-label values create a better experience immediately.
For mobile overlays, focus should remain contained while the panel is open and return gracefully when it closes.
Accessibility is not a polish phase task. It is part of the component contract and should be considered from first implementation.
